systemStatus.detail: (1) Toast: Tue May 26 DPS arrived via Group email at 6:14 AM PT. Per-store DPS expected ~7:38 AM PT — numbers should match. (2) Sling: NO Wed May 27 daily report yet at 7 AM PT (latest Tue May 26: 7 emp / 32.91 hrs). Next run will refresh. Isael 4:59A-4:59A open shift still flagged. (3) Reviews: Graham Fischer-Corners 5-star from Tue May 26 11:06 PM still top reply target; Scott A 5-star now 5d unanswered. (4) Google Ads live scrape: May 26 cost $21.22 (+$4.48 vs May 25), 6,671 impr, 136 clicks, 2.04% CTR, 0 conversions. 1 new email in last 24h (standard campaign report). (5) Yelp Ads live scrape: 30d snapshot 52k impr / 747 PV / 181 leads from ads; billing period $691.98. (6) TripAdvisor: no analytics email in last 2 days. (7) GitHub PAT: 200 OK on read.
